title: Glenda Residences
tagline: Apartment billing system with Telegram bot and SMS automation
bullets: Manages full tenant lifecycle from registration to payment tracking
Telegram bot and admin app share one database for operational redundancy
Deployed with automatic schema migrations during startup

title: DripMon
tagline: Community-driven battle tracker and roster utility
bullets: Helps players track team composition and matchup trends
Balances quick data entry with clean tournament-ready views
Built to support recurring community events

title: Daarkin
tagline: Production web app with polished UX and real deployment flow
bullets: Focused on smooth UX transitions and strong interaction feedback
Uses typed data contracts for predictable rendering
Deployed with repeatable CI and preview workflow

title: VGC Puzzle Trainer
tagline: Scenario-based battle puzzle trainer for competitive players
bullets: Presents short tactical puzzles with clear win conditions
Transforms match concepts into repeatable training loops

title: SpeakForge
tagline: Language and communication tool focused on iterative learning
bullets: Guides users through structured speaking and review loops
Emphasizes fast feedback and lightweight interaction
Built for maintainability with modular service boundaries
